english translation text: Ziyarat Of Syeda Fatima Zehra (SA)
Peace be upon you, O examined lady.
He Who created you has examined you
and found that you have passed the examination patiently.

arabic text: أَنَا لَكِ مُصَدِّقٌ صَابِرٌ عَلَىٰ مَا أَتَىٰ بِهِ أَبُوكِ وَوَصِيُّهُ صَلَوَاتُ ٱللَّهِ عَلَيْهِمَا
english translation text: I verify that you were patient about what came upon your father and his his successor peace be upon both of
I now beseech you by my belief in you
to attach & associate me with my belief in both of them
so that I will be delighted.
So, testify for me that I am totally loyal to you
and to your Household;
peace of Allah be upon them all.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O daughter of the Messenger of Allah.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ نَبِيِّ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O daughter of the Prophet of Allah.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ حَبِيبِ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O daughter of the most beloved of Allah.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ خَلِيلِ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O daughter of the Intimate Servant of Allah.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ صَفيِّ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O daughter of the Choice of Allah.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ امِينِ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O daughter of the Trustee of Allah.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ خَيْرِ خَلْقِ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O daughter of the best of Allah’s creatures.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ افْضَلِ انْبِيَاءِ ٱللَّهِ وَرُسُلِهِ وَمَلاَئِكَتِهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O daughter of the best of Allah’s Prophets, Messengers, and angels.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ خَيْرِ ٱلْبَرِّيَةِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O daughter of the best of all created beings.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا سِيِّدَةَ نِسَاءِ ٱلْعَالَمينَ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O doyenne of all women of the world,
including the past and the coming generations.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا زَوْجَةَ وَلِيِّ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O lady of the Intimate Servant of Allah
and the best of all created beings after the Messenger of Allah.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا امَّ ٱلْحَسَنِ وَٱلْحُسَيْنِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O mother of al-Hasan and al-Husayn,
the two chiefs of the youth of Paradise.
Peace be upon you, O veracious and martyr.
Peace be upon you, O content and pleased.
Peace be upon you, O virtuous and pure.
Peace be upon you, O Paradisiacal human being.
Peace be upon you, O pious and immaculate.
Peace be upon you, O one talked by the angels, O knowledgeable.
Peace be upon you, O oppressed lady whose right was usurped.
Peace be upon you, O persecuted and maltreated.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا فَاطِمَةُ بِنْتَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O Fatimah the daughter of the Messenger of Allah.
So be upon you the mercy and blessings of Allah.
May Allah bless you,
your soul, and your body.

arabic text: اشْهَدُ انَّكِ مَضَيْتِ عَلَىٰ بَيِّنَةٍ مِنْ رَبِّكِ
english translation text: I bear witness that you have spent your life with full awareness of your duty towards your Lord

arabic text: وَانَّ مَنْ سَرَّكِ فَقَدْ سَرَّ رَسُولَ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: and (I bear witness) that he who pleases you will have pleased the Messenger of Allah,
peace be upon him and his Household,

arabic text: وَمَنْ جَفَاكِ فَقَدْ جَفَا رَسُولَ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: and he who displeases you will have displeased the Messenger of Allah,
peace be upon him and his Household,

arabic text: وَمَنْ آذَاكِ فَقَدْ آذَىٰ رَسُولَ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: and he who harms you will have harmed the Messenger of Allah,
peace be upon him and his Household,

arabic text: وَمَنْ وَصَلَكِ فَقَدْ وَصَلَ رَسُولَ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: and he who respects you will have respected the Messenger of Allah,
peace be upon him and his Household,

arabic text: وَمَنْ قَطَعَكِ فَقَدْ قَطَعَ رَسُولَ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: and he who disrespects you will have disrespected the messenger of Allah,
peace be upon him and his Household.
This is because you are an inseparable part of him (i.e. the Holy Prophet),
and you are his soul with which he lives.
I ask Allah, His Messengers, and His angels to be the witnesses
that I am verily pleased with him whomever you accept,
I am displeased with him whomever you detest,
I disavow him whomever you disavow,
I am loyal to him whomever you support,
I am the enemy of him whomever you betake as enemy,
I am hateful to him whomever you hate,
and I like him whomever you like.
Verily, Allah is Sufficient as Witness, Reckoner,
Punisher, and Rewarder.
